title: Hiring Medical Officer at Lilavati Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Lilavati Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Lilavati Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lilavati Hospital:
Lilavati Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital!
